files.name: summary.json
files.description: Headline results: per (model, condition) CondAgree macro mean + 95% CI + per-user array; lucky_guess line; real move distribution.

files.name: manifest.json
files.description: Experiment config: the 9 models with OpenRouter ids + reasoning efforts + concurrency, split file, taxonomy, judge model, n_per_user, n_points, git sha, timestamp.

files.name: taxonomy.json
files.description: The v2 4-way move taxonomy: categories (approve/critical/directive/inquiry), the exact classifier prompt body, OLD->NEW remap from the legacy 7-way, and inter-judge kappa.

files.name: splits.json
files.description: Train/val/test split with NON-OVERLAPPING users AND repos (connected components of the user<->repo graph); qualifying eval-users per split.

files.name: points.jsonl
files.description: The 480 frozen held-out prediction points (one JSON per line): {point_id, slug, repo, turn_index, prev_agent, real_text}.

files.name: raw.jsonl
files.description: Every trial (one JSON per line). Generation: {key, kind:'gen', point_id, slug, model, model_id, backend, effort, cond('distilled'|'generic'), text, ts, seed?}. Move label: {key:'lab:haiku:<hash>', move}. Join gens to labels via the 4-way classifier on (prev_agent, text).

files.name: cases.json
files.description: Case-study data for glm-5.2 / gemini-3.1-pro / osim-4b: per-developer CondAgree ±profile (delta), and every moment where the profile flipped the move (with the agent turn, real message+move, and both ±profile generations+moves).

files.name: category_recall.json
files.description: Per-move agree-rate (recall) for all 9 models, both conditions: of moments whose real move was X, the fraction the sim matched. Includes the profile delta per category. Drives the by-category heatmap.
